Dear {{first_name}},

Best regards,
The Admissions Team

Template Requirements

Set as Mandatory Template Required

When enabled, all targeted schools must use this template. They cannot disable or modify locked content.

Mandatory templates ensure consistent communications across your trust. Schools will see this template in their library but won't be able to delete it or edit locked sections.

From: Demo Schools Admissions <admissions@arkschools.org>
To: parent@example.com
Your application has been received - Emma Smith

Dear Jane Smith,

We are pleased to confirm that we have received the application for Emma Smith to join Demo Academy for the 2024/25 academic year.

Your reference number is: ARK-2024-00847

You can track the status of your application at any time by visiting our application portal.

If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact our admissions team.

Best regards,
Demo Academy Admissions Team

Demo Schools
65 Kingsway, London WC2B 6TD

Access Levels
View Only: View events and registrations. Cannot make changes.
Can Edit: Edit event dates, times, and capacity. Cannot cancel.
Cancel/Resched: Cancel or reschedule events. Cannot edit forms.

All levels exclude forms, admissions, and comms modules.

What happens when you push?
